metadata.task: Apply a horizontal force to the mass in the mass-spring system, step the simulation, and determine whether the motion repeats around an equilibrium. Return 1 for oscillatory motion and 2 for non-oscillatory motion.
metadata.description: The red sphere is attached to an anchor by the spring-like constraint. Disturb the sphere and sample its position or velocity over time before choosing the numeric motion code.

expected_behavior: The LLM applies an external force and tracks the mass over time to observe repeated motion.
reasoning: After disturbance, the constrained mass returns and continues moving about equilibrium, so the numeric motion code is 1.
